Container.Name: vikunja-multiday-view
Container.Overview: A multi-day kanban view for Vikunja tasks. Renders incomplete tasks as day-columns (Overdue, Today + N future days, Future, No Date). Drag-and-drop reschedules due dates. Talks to your existing Vikunja instance over the REST API; this container does NOT include or replace Vikunja itself.
Container.Description:
Companion app to Vikunja that adds a multi-day kanban view (Overdue + Today + N future days + Future + No Date). Drag-and-drop reschedules tasks via the Vikunja API. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS served by nginx; no database, no state in this container.
REQUIRED: a personal API token from your Vikunja instance with scopes: Tasks (read_all + update + create), Projects (read_all). Generate at avatar -> Settings -> API Tokens.
SECURITY NOTE: the API token is served to the browser as part of config.js. If exposed via Cloudflare Tunnel or a reverse proxy, gate the hostname with Cloudflare Access (or equivalent SSO) so random internet visitors cannot read the token. See the project README for details.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: HTTP port that nginx serves the app on. Default 3457 (sits right next to Vikunja's 3456); change if that conflicts.

Config.Name: Vikunja URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Vikunja instance, no trailing slash. Example: https://tasks.yourdomain.com . The app derives both the API base (/api/v1) and task page links from this.

Config.Name: Vikunja API Token
Config.Description: Personal API token from Vikunja. Required scopes: Tasks read_all + update + create, Projects read_all. The token is stored in this container's environment and written into the browser-served config.js at startup.
